description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in navy blue from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the synthetic leather and zipper embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 26cmWidth: 45cmDepth: 11cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pockets and organiser pocketsTwo short handles with alternate long strap providedZipper decoration on frontZipped pockets on backBag body gathered to baseCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
